Business Meaning: Participants are active, satisfied, and responsive during the first week.
Recommended Marketing or Support Strateg: Use as success cases, request feedback, and encourage referrals or advanced course enrollment.

Business Meaning: Participants are in longer and higher-fee courses but show weak early engagement and low satisfaction.
Recommended Marketing or Support Strateg: Prioritize early coaching, manager follow-up, onboarding support, and reminder communication.

Business Meaning: Participants are connected to higher-fee long courses and show strong engagement and satisfaction.
Recommended Marketing or Support Strateg: Protect this high-value group with premium support, progress updates, and advanced learning pathways.

Business Meaning: Participants are in shorter courses with moderate engagement and may need light nudges.
Recommended Marketing or Support Strateg: Send friendly reminders, simple LMS tips, progress nudges, and short motivational messages.
